belier.intro: The Moon continues through Gemini, now at 17 degrees, still in your third house as the waning crescent phase deepens toward its final quiet at 24 percent illumination. Yesterday's quick exchanges settle today into a more considered use of words. The Leo Sun advances to 15 degrees in your fifth house, keeping warmth and creative confidence steady beneath the day's lighter mental focus.
belier.love: A conversation begun yesterday can deepen today if you allow more honesty and less haste into the exchange.
belier.work: Continue handling communication tasks, but slow down enough today to make sure the details are right.
belier.energy: Your fire remains quick but is beginning to seek rest as the crescent Moon nears its end. Do not overextend today.
belier.intuition: A thought that caught your attention yesterday deserves one more moment of reflection before you act on it.
belier.mantra: I choose my words with both honesty and care.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your second house today, keeping material and resource matters present as the waning crescent phase nears its quiet close. The Leo Sun in your fourth house continues to warm home and family themes, offering a gentle emotional backdrop to today's practical focus.
taureau.love: Continue offering practical support in a relationship today, but pair it with a warm word as the crescent Moon softens.
taureau.work: A financial conversation started yesterday can be finalized today with a calm, factual tone.
taureau.energy: Your steadiness now leans toward rest. Honor the need to slow down as this lunar cycle nears its end.
taureau.intuition: The thought about money or value from yesterday deserves a final, honest look today before you decide.
taureau.mantra: I bring both practicality and warmth to what I value.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon remains in your own sign today at 17 degrees Gemini, and the waning crescent phase brings a quieter, more reflective version of yesterday's lively energy. The Leo Sun in your third house keeps your mind active, though today favors integration over new expression.
gemeaux.love: What you expressed honestly yesterday can now be allowed to settle. Trust that you do not need to say more right now.
gemeaux.work: Use today to review and refine what you communicated yesterday rather than starting something new.
gemeaux.energy: Your quickness slows slightly today, asking for rest before the coming new lunar cycle.
gemeaux.intuition: The quick read you trusted yesterday about a person or situation continues to hold true today.
gemeaux.mantra: I let my words settle before I add any more.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your twelfth house today, deepening yesterday's inward pull as the waning crescent phase nears its final rest. The Leo Sun in your own second house keeps questions of security quietly present, but today still favors reflection over resolution.
cancer.love: The private feeling you sat with yesterday may now be ready for gentle, careful expression, if you feel called to share it.
cancer.work: Continue with quiet, unseen tasks today. Rest remains more valuable than visible productivity right now.
cancer.energy: Withdrawal deepens today as the crescent Moon nears its end. Allow yourself real stillness.
cancer.intuition: A dream or image from last night may complete a message that began forming yesterday. Look for the connection.
cancer.mantra: I rest fully before the next cycle begins.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your eleventh house today, keeping social and forward-looking energy present as the waning crescent phase moves toward its close. The Sun remains in your own sign, and your natural warmth continues steady even as the day favors quieter connection over active networking.
lion.love: A friend's insight from yesterday about your relationship deserves a second, calmer consideration today.
lion.work: Follow up briefly on yesterday's networking or idea-sharing, but do not force new momentum today.
lion.energy: Your sociable energy softens today. A smaller, more meaningful connection serves you better than a wide one.
lion.intuition: What you sensed yesterday about a group's true direction is confirmed today. Trust it fully.
lion.mantra: I trust what I have already sensed about my circle.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your tenth house today, keeping career communication present as the waning crescent phase nears its quiet end. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house continues to favor private reflection even as public responsibilities linger.
vierge.love: A partner continues to appreciate a brief, honest update on your professional pressures today.
vierge.work: Finalize the communication you began yesterday about your professional direction. Keep it simple and clear.
vierge.energy: Your mental engagement continues but asks for a slower pace today as the lunar cycle nears completion.
vierge.intuition: The thought about your career direction from yesterday deserves a final, clear-eyed decision today.
vierge.mantra: I bring yesterday's clarity to a simple conclusion.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your ninth house today, keeping curiosity about belief and long-range vision alive as the waning crescent phase nears its close. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendships warmly present in the background of a reflective day.
balance.love: The enjoyable conversation about differing perspectives from yesterday can deepen today into something more meaningful.
balance.work: The idea you explored yesterday about your long-term direction deserves a calm, honest evaluation today.
balance.energy: Curiosity softens into reflection today. Let yesterday's new idea settle rather than chasing another.
balance.intuition: The idea you noted yesterday reveals more of its significance today. Trust what continues to resonate.
balance.mantra: I let my newest ideas settle before I act on them.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your eighth house today, keeping trust and shared resources present in a lighter form as the waning crescent phase nears its close. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps career visibility present in the background of a more reflective day.
scorpion.love: The honest conversation from yesterday about trust can now rest. Give it space rather than revisiting it further.
scorpion.work: Finalize the financial or contractual clarity you gained yesterday with one clear, simple step today.
scorpion.energy: Mental quickness softens into reflection today, well suited to review rather than new negotiation.
scorpion.intuition: What you learned yesterday about someone's true intentions continues to prove accurate today.
scorpion.mantra: I let yesterday's truth rest without further need to test it.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your seventh house today, keeping partnership conversations light but meaningful as the waning crescent phase nears its close. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps a sense of possibility alive even as the day favors settling over exploring.
sagittaire.love: The door opened yesterday by a light-hearted conversation can now be walked through with a bit more depth today.
sagittaire.work: A negotiation benefits from consolidating yesterday's flexible approach into a clear, simple agreement today.
sagittaire.energy: Sociable energy softens today, favoring a single meaningful exchange over broad engagement.
sagittaire.intuition: What you sensed yesterday about a partner's unspoken needs deserves gentle, direct acknowledgment today.
sagittaire.mantra: I bring warmth to the openness I found yesterday.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your sixth house today, keeping daily routines and communication present as the waning crescent phase nears its final rest. The Leo Sun in your eighth house continues to add quiet depth to ordinary exchanges.
capricorne.love: The honest exchange about daily rhythms from yesterday deserves to be honored today through consistent action.
capricorne.work: Implement the small adjustment you identified yesterday. Today favors follow-through over further tweaking.
capricorne.energy: Mental engagement softens today, favoring simple, steady completion of daily tasks.
capricorne.intuition: The practical insight from yesterday continues to prove useful today. Trust that the small change was correct.
capricorne.mantra: I follow through on the small truths I have found.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your fifth house today, keeping playful creative energy present as the waning crescent phase nears its close. Saturn retrograde continues its structuring work in your own sign, while the Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key relationship steady and warm.
verseau.love: The lightness that deepened a relationship yesterday continues to serve you well today. Keep the tone gentle.
verseau.work: The creative idea shared yesterday deserves a concrete next step today, however small.
verseau.energy: Playful energy softens into quieter creative focus today as the crescent Moon nears its end.
verseau.intuition: The offhand idea from yesterday continues to show its value today. Give it a real chance.
verseau.mantra: I give my ideas room to grow at their own pace.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon in Gemini at 17 degrees continues through your fourth house today, keeping home and family communication present as the waning crescent phase nears its quiet close. The Leo Sun in your sixth house continues to ground your usual sensitivity in practical daily matters.
poissons.love: The small misunderstanding cleared yesterday deserves continued gentleness today rather than further discussion.
poissons.work: Balancing home and daily responsibilities continues to ease today with the clarity you found yesterday.
poissons.energy: Mental activity softens into quieter domestic focus today as this lunar cycle nears its end.
poissons.intuition: The honest thought about your home life from yesterday continues to feel true today. Trust it.
poissons.mantra: I let peace settle where honesty has already done its work.
poissons.author: Sibylle
